opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My vision suddenly went jagged and blind on the right side, my hand went numb, and now I have a pounding headache. I take the pill every day.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The weird vision and numbness scared me and now I've got a really bad one-sided headache. I also don't want to run out of my contraception or fall pregnant.

symptom_narrative.duration: the vision and numbness only lasted a short while and have gone now; the headache has been building since and is still here
symptom_narrative.character: first a jagged, flickering, part-blind patch in my vision, then pins-and-needles that crept up my right hand and arm, and now a throbbing headache on one side
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the headache is severe and I'm lying in a dark room because the light hurts
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: vision on the right side, numbness in the right hand and arm, headache on one side of my head
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the vision and numbness came on gradually and spread, then faded; the headache came afterwards and is constant
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying down in the dark and quiet helps the headache a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: light and noise make the headache worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: sensitivity to light; feeling very anxious
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I don't think I've had the jagged vision and numbness like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can still move around but I'm stuck lying in a dark room because of the pain and the light hurting my eyes

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: the combined contraceptive pill (I take it every day)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: very worried about losing reliable contraception and about the sudden vision and numbness

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants to stay reliably protected from pregnancy and is anxious about any gap in contraception
